pages.full_text:
42 __Sunday__
      We walked to a village for church, but arrived too late. Père Vigne had started a convent there. Lots of Stations of the cross by a modern sculptor Bongati? Simon ran home because it started raining. We had very heavy rain during lunch. In the afternoon we walked back to the river & the boys & Simon swam, & so did Eve after washing all the clothes in the river. A glorious afternoon. In the evening Simon cooked spaghetti & it rained again. There are beautiful brown & white rabbits in the campsite, under poplar trees. The tree leaves have stained the tent because of all the rain.
__Monday__
      We motored across the north of the Ardèche, looking at old volcanoes. The mountainous
pages.notes: Sculptor name reads as 'Bongati' but uncertain — could be a different reading. 'Père Vigne' may be a personal name or place name associated with a convent. No year visible on this page; volume covers 1989–2003, exact year cannot be confirmed from page content alone. Text continues onto right page.

pages.full_text:
countryside is very pretty, but slow motoring. We have bought lavender honey at __Gerbier de Jonc__.
      We are camping by a volcanic lake at __Lac de Issarlès__. Pine trees, a beautiful view & swimming in the lake.
__Tuesday__ We stopped at __Aubenas__ to see the château. It was lived in continuously by the same family (with 2 or 3 female inheritors) from about 1200 to 1792. The boys were very patient, considering they couldn't understand a word of the French guide. A lovely portrait of a woman in the gallery at the top.
      We came on to __Les Blaches__ Casteljou. It would be even more beautiful if it weren't so crowded.
pages.notes: Page number 43 visible in top-right corner. 'Lac de Issarlès' — the diary appears to write it as two separate words 'Lac de Issarlès'; the lake is known as Lac d'Issarlès in French. 'Les Blaches Casteljou' may refer to a campsite or place called Les Blaches at or near Casteljou; asterisks (****) appear after 'Les Blaches' in the original. The text at the top of this page continues from the left page (Monday entry). No year is visible on this page.
